description: Configure File Integrity Monitoring (FIM) for the Wazuh Manager in the 'wazuh-wazuh.manager-1' container to monitor '/var/ossec/etc' in real-time. Update '/var/ossec/etc/ossec.conf' to include 'sregex' ignore rules for temporary editor files ending in '.swp' and '.tmp'. Apply the configuration changes and verify that creating '/var/ossec/etc/test_alert.xml' triggers an alert while '/var/ossec/etc/vim_noise.swp' does not.
